role: Coordinated service orchestration layer for ArchSpine runtime command pipelines, including check, fix, sync, and view generation, with runtime session management and LLM integration.
responsibility: Combined orchestration of the ArchSpine mirror system's core operations: check (scan, AST, validate, record usage), fix (multi-retry pipeline with LLM correction), sync (reconciliation, AST, summarization, commit), and view generation (architecture diagrams, risk hotspots, public surface). It manages runtime sessions with checkpoint resumability and lock protection, resolves execution profiles and LLM settings, prepares task contexts with scanning and policy enforcement, and provides administrative services for repository initialization, publishing preflight validation, and LLM configuration types. The layer ensures consistent error handling, metric recording, and lifecycle management across all command pipelines.

children.role: Service facade orchestrating the ArchSpine 'check' command pipeline, coordinating scanning, AST extraction, validation, and usage recording within a managed runtime session.

Service-layer orchestrator for the ArchSpine architectural fix pipeline, managing the sequential execution of scanning, AST extraction, LLM-driven correction, and validation tasks, with retry support and runtime session integration.
TypeScript type definition module for LLM configuration command structures and view models within the view service layer.
Infrastructure-layer validation facade that asserts runtime conditions for publish operations, including baseline checks, snapshot readiness, and local strategy warnings.
Infrastructure module defining interfaces and orchestration logic for repository artifact management and initialization strategies.
Type definition module for resolved runtime execution profiles and commands within the service layer.
Service layer facade for runtime orchestration that resolves execution profiles, LLM settings, view configurations, and constructs domain service instances (Check, Fix, Sync) in the ArchSpine system.
TypeScript interface defining a placeholder boundary for future runtime service capabilities within the ArchSpine type system.
Infrastructure orchestration service for managing resumable command execution sessions with checkpoint validation and protected output mutation detection.
Core orchestration service that coordinates the multi-stage synchronization pipeline for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Service-level factory and orchestrator that prepares a fully configured task context for analysis pipelines.
View layer for generating and rendering architectural visualizations and analysis reports.
Service orchestrator for generating and managing architectural views from indexed codebase data.
